description: Knowledge: Wrapping a scaler and model inside a sklearn Pipeline passed to cross_val_score

_meta.explanation: Output is 'Pipeline CV refits scaler per fold — no leakage; mean accuracy: 0.960'. Rule: Wrapping a scaler and model inside a sklearn Pipeline passed to cross_val_score prevents data leakage because the scaler is re-fit only on each fold's training split, never seeing the validation data.
_meta.curriculum_note: Direct behavioral prediction: Wrapping a scaler and model inside a sklearn Pipeline passed to cross_val_score prevents data leakage because the scaler is re-fit only on each fold's training split, never seeing the validation data.
